case_title: MICHAEL SELLITTO VS. VANMOOF USA INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,799.00 FILED BY SELLITTO, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT VANMOOF USA INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE ROVERT ANDREW MILLER - SEE SIGNATURE SECTION OF GREEN CARD] SERVED JUL-21-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VANMOOF USA INC
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VANMOOF USA INC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SELLITTO, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT VANMOOF USA INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-15-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL SELLITTO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VANMOOF USA, INC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SELLITTO, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VANMOOF USA INC $3,799.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,864.00, HOWEVER, IF DEFENDANT HONORS THE $2380 REFUND, THEN JUDGMENT SHALL BE REDUCED TO $1399. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SELLITTO, MICHAEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2023 - JUDGMENT.
